highlights.text: I wrote last Tuesday at 4pm : “Bear case tomorrow: Begins under 6935-38.” We lost 6935 last Wednesday, and sold all day.
Readers were prepared for this and I wrote last Wednesday at 4pm: “My general lean is ES can try some back-testing.
My lean was bulls could do it .
I wrote Friday at 4pm: “My general lean is bulls can try to do some backtesting with 6913, 6925, 6935/42 next up.
Rallies on the other hand in ES occur when price puts in a Failed Breakdown (my core setup).

In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll do a deep dive into some of the multitude of Failed Breakdowns we had last week/Friday (including the one that caused Friday afternoons 40 point instant rip).

post_title: SPX Goes Green. Dead Cat Bounce, or Bottom? January 6th Plan
